narrative:
Carlisle Township has 5,349 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.3%, a modest Republican lean of 3.2 percentage points.
